title: Server-side Creative Fly No Clip
description: a server-side creative fly no clip datapack, like the carpet one but this project don't need carpet on clients
body:
# Server-side Creative Fly No Clip
This is a server-side *datapack* that enable players to toggle CreativeFlyNoClip without carpet or other mods.(but the no clip isn't really smooth and satisfying)

To toggle, players can hold W, A, D at the same time.

This pack will set your gamemode to spectator when you are passing through a wall
You need to sprint while flying to pass through vertical walls
